image_prompt: A split-screen image. On the left side, a person is at a desk, head slumped, eyes barely open, surrounded by stacks of books and coffee cups, looking utterly exhausted and disheveled. The background is dim and chaotic. On the right side, the same person is shown waking up in a bright, tidy bedroom, stretching with a refreshed and joyful expression, bathed in warm morning light. The Portuguese sentence "Dormir te deixa menos cansado." is elegantly written on a fluffy pillow in the refreshed side of the image, or as a glowing neon sign above the bed. Dreamy and contrasting lighting, inviting atmosphere on the right, dark and dull on the left. High detail, photorealistic.
caption: Será que alguém precisava ouvir essa hoje? 😴💤 A ciência comprova: um bom sono faz milagres! Marca aquele amigo que precisa urgentemente de uma soneca! #SonoReparador #MenosCansaço #VerdadesDaVida #DescansoMerecido #VidaSaudável
